title: datura alba
intro: Datura alba, also known as Angel's Trumpet, is a perennial plant native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, characterized by its large, white, trumpet-shaped flowers and fragrant scent. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include sedative, analgesic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Datura alba include relief from insomnia, anxiety, and pain management, as well as its potential use in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Datura alba can be prepared into herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which should be used under the guidance of a qualified medical professional due to the plant's potential toxicity and side effects.
